reason: Tests need rewrite, not instruction. The failing rubrics are: (1) solution_uniqueness_guard — tests assert exact string matches on variable names ('child_size', etc.) which makes alternative correct implementations fail; (2) tests_verify_behavior_not_text — all fail-to-pass tests are pure text-matching without code execution; (3) anti_cheating_measures — tests are fully readable and pure text-matching, enabling trivial cheating. These are test design flaws. The instruction has been reconciled to remove solution leakage and hint leakage (nop=0, gold=1 hold).
